Container.Name: pumperly
Container.Overview: Open-source fuel price comparison and EV route planner with real-time prices across 36 countries. Combines route planning with fuel stations and EV chargers, featuring detour calculation and "cheapest within N minutes" filtering. Multi-language (16 languages), multi-currency. [br][br] [b]Requires PostgreSQL with PostGIS extension.[/b] Optional Valhalla (routing) and Photon (geocoding) containers for full functionality. [br][br] [b]Note:[/b] Full setup with Valhalla tiles requires ~300 GB disk and ~24 GB RAM during tile building. [br][br] More info: https://github.com/GeiserX/pumperly
Container.ExtraSearchTerms: fuel gas petrol price compare route planner ev charger station

Config.Name: Default Country
Config.Description: Default country for initial map view (ISO code)

Config.Name: Enabled Countries
Config.Description: Comma-separated ISO codes to enable (empty = all)

Config.Name: Default Fuel
Config.Description: Default fuel type for price display
